headline: We're very bullish on equities, says Clough Capital's Vince Lorusso
summary: Vince Lorusso, Clough Capital president and CEO, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest market trends, state of the economy, impact of the Iran war, and more.

raw.headline: We're very bullish on equities, says Clough Capital's Vince Lorusso
raw.summary: Vince Lorusso, Clough Capital president and CEO, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest market trends, state of the economy, impact of the Iran war, and more.

headline: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of wireless chips maker Skyworks Solutions (NASDAQ: SWKS) jumped 2.8% in the afternoon session after Barclays upgraded its rating on the stock to Overweight from Equalweight, citing a belief that Apple will delay the launch of its low-end phones.
